title: Foo Bar Slow Analytical API
description: An HTTP API serves analytical queries from ClickHouse but responses take 2+ seconds. Optimize the queries, add materialized views, or pre-aggregate so /api/metrics and /api/breakdown return in under 200ms.

tasks.description: Optimize the analytical API so /api/metrics and /api/breakdown respond in under 200ms. Use materialized views, pre-aggregation, or query tuning.

infrastructure.description: ClickHouse with analytics.events (5M rows). HTTP API on port 3000 runs slow ad-hoc queries.
